hero.heading: Welcome to Boulevardens Blomster
hero.subheading: Handcrafted floral arrangements with a personal touch — for every occasion.

intro.heading: Boulevardens Blomster
intro.text:
Welcome to our flower shop on Høje Taastrup Boulevard, where we create beautiful floral arrangements with your personal touch for every occasion.

We always have ready-made gift baskets available in the shop for both small and special events. On our shelves you'll find unique pots and vases, fine chocolates, and wines for every taste to make your perfect gift basket.

We offer everything in floral design: bouquets, bridal bouquets, table decorations, church decorations, casket arrangements, funeral wreaths, oasis hearts, oasis crosses, and grave ornaments.
intro.deliveryNote: Between 4–6 PM we also deliver within the Taastrup municipality.
